scripts.dev:vps: concurrently -n SERVER,CLIENT -c auto "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev -- --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5173 --strictPort"
scripts.dev:local: concurrently -n SERVER,CLIENT -c auto "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.postinstall: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
